title: polyscias vieillardii subsp. vieillardii
intro: Polyscias vieillardii subsp. vieillardii is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, commonly known as the Vieillard's polynesian tree or Vieillard's manglietia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Polyscias vieillardii subsp. vieillardii include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
